members.name: _InputEvent
members.signature: public void _InputEvent(Viewport viewport, InputEvent @event, int shapeIdx)
members.summary: Accepts unhandled [InputEvent]s. [param shape_idx] is the child index of the clicked [Shape2D]. Connect to [signal input_event] to easily pick up these events. [b]Note:[/b] [method _input_event] requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set.

members.name: _MouseEnter
members.summary: Called when the mouse pointer enters any of this object's shapes. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set. Note that moving between different shapes within a single [CollisionObject2D] won't cause this function to be called.

members.name: _MouseExit
members.summary: Called when the mouse pointer exits all this object's shapes. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set. Note that moving between different shapes within a single [CollisionObject2D] won't cause this function to be called.

members.name: _MouseShapeEnter
members.summary: Called when the mouse pointer enters any of this object's shapes or moves from one shape to another. [param shape_idx] is the child index of the newly entered [Shape2D]. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be called.

members.name: _MouseShapeExit
members.summary: Called when the mouse pointer exits any of this object's shapes. [param shape_idx] is the child index of the exited [Shape2D]. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be called.

members.name: CreateShapeOwner
members.summary: Creates a new shape owner for the given object. Returns [code]owner_id[/code] of the new owner for future reference.

members.name: GetCollisionLayerValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member collision_layer] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetCollisionMaskValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member collision_mask] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetRid
members.summary: Returns the object's [RID].

members.name: GetShapeOwnerOneWayCollisionDirection
members.summary: Returns the [code]one_way_collision_direction[/code] of the shape owner identified by the given [param owner_id].

members.name: GetShapeOwnerOneWayCollisionMargin
members.summary: Returns the [code]one_way_collision_margin[/code] of the shape owner identified by given [param owner_id].

members.name: GetShapeOwners
members.summary: Returns an [Array] of [code]owner_id[/code] identifiers. You can use these ids in other methods that take [code]owner_id[/code] as an argument.

members.name: IsShapeOwnerDisabled
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the shape owner and its shapes are disabled.

members.name: IsShapeOwnerOneWayCollisionEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if collisions for the shape owner originating from this [CollisionObject2D] will not be reported to collided with [CollisionObject2D]s.

members.name: RemoveShapeOwner
members.summary: Removes the given shape owner.

members.name: SetCollisionLayerValue
members.signature: public void SetCollisionLayerValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member collision_layer], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetCollisionMaskValue
members.signature: public void SetCollisionMaskValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member collision_mask], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: ShapeFindOwner
members.summary: Returns the [code]owner_id[/code] of the given shape.

members.name: ShapeOwnerAddShape
members.signature: public void ShapeOwnerAddShape(int ownerId, Shape2D shape)
members.summary: Adds a [Shape2D] to the shape owner.

members.name: ShapeOwnerClearShapes
members.summary: Removes all shapes from the shape owner.

members.name: ShapeOwnerGetOwner
members.summary: Returns the parent object of the given shape owner.

members.name: ShapeOwnerGetShape
members.signature: public Shape2D ShapeOwnerGetShape(int ownerId, int shapeId)
members.summary: Returns the [Shape2D] with the given ID from the given shape owner.

members.name: ShapeOwnerGetShapeCount
members.summary: Returns the number of shapes the given shape owner contains.

members.name: ShapeOwnerGetShapeIndex
members.signature: public int ShapeOwnerGetShapeIndex(int ownerId, int shapeId)
members.summary: Returns the child index of the [Shape2D] with the given ID from the given shape owner.

members.name: ShapeOwnerGetTransform
members.summary: Returns the shape owner's [Transform2D].

members.name: ShapeOwnerRemoveShape
members.signature: public void ShapeOwnerRemoveShape(int ownerId, int shapeId)
members.summary: Removes a shape from the given shape owner.

members.name: ShapeOwnerSetDisabled
members.signature: public void ShapeOwnerSetDisabled(int ownerId, bool disabled)
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], disables the given shape owner.

members.name: ShapeOwnerSetOneWayCollision
members.signature: public void ShapeOwnerSetOneWayCollision(int ownerId, bool enable)
members.summary: If [param enable] is [code]true[/code], collisions for the shape owner originating from this [CollisionObject2D] will not be reported to collided with [CollisionObject2D]s.

members.name: ShapeOwnerSetOneWayCollisionDirection
members.signature: public void ShapeOwnerSetOneWayCollisionDirection(int ownerId, Vector2 direction)
members.summary: Sets the [code]one_way_collision_direction[/code] of the shape owner identified by the given [param owner_id] to [param direction].

members.name: ShapeOwnerSetOneWayCollisionMargin
members.signature: public void ShapeOwnerSetOneWayCollisionMargin(int ownerId, float margin)
members.summary: Sets the [code]one_way_collision_margin[/code] of the shape owner identified by given [param owner_id] to [param margin] pixels.

members.name: ShapeOwnerSetTransform
members.signature: public void ShapeOwnerSetTransform(int ownerId, Transform2D transform)
members.summary: Sets the [Transform2D] of the given shape owner.

members.name: CollisionLayer
members.summary: The physics layers this CollisionObject2D is in. Collision objects can exist in one or more of 32 different layers. See also [member collision_mask]. [b]Note:[/b] Object A can detect a contact with object B only if object B is in any of the layers that object A scans. See [url=$DOCS_URL/tutorials/physics/physics_introduction.html#collision-layers-and-masks]Collision layers and masks[/url] in the documentation for more information.

members.name: CollisionMask
members.summary: The physics layers this CollisionObject2D scans. Collision objects can scan one or more of 32 different layers. See also [member collision_layer]. [b]Note:[/b] Object A can detect a contact with object B only if object B is in any of the layers that object A scans. See [url=$DOCS_URL/tutorials/physics/physics_introduction.html#collision-layers-and-masks]Collision layers and masks[/url] in the documentation for more information.

members.name: CollisionPriority
members.summary: The priority used to solve colliding when occurring penetration. The higher the priority is, the lower the penetration into the object will be. This can for example be used to prevent the player from breaking through the boundaries of a level.

members.name: DisableMode
members.summary: Defines the behavior in physics when [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED].

members.name: InputPickable
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], this object is pickable. A pickable object can detect the mouse pointer entering/leaving, and if the mouse is inside it, report input events. Requires at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set.

signals.name: InputEvent
signals.summary: Emitted when an input event occurs. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set. See [method _input_event] for details.

signals.name: MouseEntered
signals.summary: Emitted when the mouse pointer enters any of this object's shapes. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set. Note that moving between different shapes within a single [CollisionObject2D] won't cause this signal to be emitted. [b]Note:[/b] Due to the lack of continuous collision detection, this signal may not be emitted in the expected order if the mouse moves fast enough and the [CollisionObject2D]'s area is small. This signal may also not be emitted if another [CollisionObject2D] is overlapping the [CollisionObject2D] in question.

signals.name: MouseExited
signals.summary: Emitted when the mouse pointer exits all this object's shapes. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set. Note that moving between different shapes within a single [CollisionObject2D] won't cause this signal to be emitted. [b]Note:[/b] Due to the lack of continuous collision detection, this signal may not be emitted in the expected order if the mouse moves fast enough and the [CollisionObject2D]'s area is small. This signal may also not be emitted if another [CollisionObject2D] is overlapping the [CollisionObject2D] in question.

signals.name: MouseShapeEntered
signals.summary: Emitted when the mouse pointer enters any of this object's shapes or moves from one shape to another. [param shape_idx] is the child index of the newly entered [Shape2D]. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set.

signals.name: MouseShapeExited
signals.summary: Emitted when the mouse pointer exits any of this object's shapes. [param shape_idx] is the child index of the exited [Shape2D]. Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be set.

values.name: DISABLE_MODE_KEEP_ACTIVE
values.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], do not affect the physics simulation.

values.name: DISABLE_MODE_MAKE_STATIC
values.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], make the body static. Doesn't affect [Area2D]. [PhysicsBody2D] can't be affected by forces or other bodies while static. Automatically set [PhysicsBody2D] back to its original mode when the [Node] is processed again.

values.name: DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE
values.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], remove from the physics simulation to stop all physics interactions with this [CollisionObject2D]. Automatically re-added to the physics simulation when the [Node] is processed again.

constants.name: DISABLE_MODE_REMOVE
constants.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], remove from the physics simulation to stop all physics interactions with this [CollisionObject2D]. Automatically re-added to the physics simulation when the [Node] is processed again.

constants.name: DISABLE_MODE_MAKE_STATIC
constants.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], make the body static. Doesn't affect [Area2D]. [PhysicsBody2D] can't be affected by forces or other bodies while static. Automatically set [PhysicsBody2D] back to its original mode when the [Node] is processed again.

constants.name: DISABLE_MODE_KEEP_ACTIVE
constants.summary: When [member Node.process_mode] is set to [constant Node.PROCESS_MODE_DISABLED], do not affect the physics simulation.

Requires [member input_pickable] to be [code]true[/code] and at least one [member collision_layer] bit to be called.
